creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patches are not being applied properly, can you check this?

[barba saga$] make patch
===>  License GPLv2 LGPL21 accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for saga-2.1.2
===>   saga-2.1.2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by saga-2.1.2 for building
===>  Extracting for saga-2.1.2
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for saga_2.1.2.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for saga-2.1.2
===>   Converting DOS text files to UNIX text files
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for saga-2.1.2
File to patch: ^C
[barba saga$] => Patch patch-src__modules_images__modules_opencv__opencv__opencv.h failed to apply cleanly.
